title: seddera humilis
intro: Seddera humilis, also known as the "creeping seddera" or "creeping climber," is a plant species belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. Seddera humilis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting wound healing. Seddera humilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties, with the herbal preparation typically involving the dried leaves and stems of the plant.
